top_signals.title: Russia’s small businesses pay the price of spiraling Ukraine war
top_signals.summary: Amid huge outlays on Moscow's war in Ukraine, tax rises, stubborn inflation and nervy consumers are all weighing on Russian small companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MSC Bets $1.4 Billion on Vizhinjam in Boost to Adani Ports
top_signals.summary: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd. secured a $1.4 billion investment commitment from Mediterranean Shipping Co., winning crucial capital to accelerate expansion and signaling investor confidence in the conglomerate’s growth plans.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Dubai set for crypto firm influx as MiCA deadline pushes companies to reassess Europe
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
